---
format:
  html
title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
listing:
  - id: workshops-listing
    type: table
    contents: workshops
    fields: [ID, Module, title , file-modified, author]
    sort:
      - ID
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: [Module, Number, title, author]

---

<a href='https://esqlabs.com/'><img src='resources/esqlabs.png' style='max-width:100%'></a>

# ESQlabs R Trainings

This website hosts all the quarto-based presentations and training courses on
Open System Pharmacology related R packages.

The source files for the material are hosted on [GitHub](https://github.com/esqLABS/r-packages-training).

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon="false"}
## 🇭🇷 PAGE 2026 — Pre-conference Workshop · 1 June 2026 · Dubrovnik

**R Workflows for advanced PB-QSP Modeling with `{ospsuite}` and `{esqlabsR}`**

Full-day instructor-led workshop. See the [agenda + day-of deck](agendas/PAGE_2026.qmd), the [cheatsheet](agendas/PAGE_2026_cheatsheet.qmd), and [pre-workshop instructions](agendas/PAGE_2026_pre-workshop-email.md).
:::


# 📊 Workshops

::: {#workshops-listing}
:::
